official_functions.role: Construct the official Login serverbound hello packet fixture
Write the official Login serverbound hello body
Write the full Login serverbound framed hello packet
Dispatch and decode the full Login serverbound framed hello packet
Name the packet id assigned in Login serverbound state
Read the decoded fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Login serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the hello body.
The official Login serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundHelloPacket.
The decoded official ServerboundHelloPacket preserves name and profileId from the fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded packet type, decoded fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove authentication success, encryption/key exchange, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer authentication success, encryption/key exchange, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
